network_summary: Sunil Eamani is the NPPES-listed MANAGER (not owner/dentist) of two generic LLCs — Dentist in Vernon Hills LLC and Dentist in Bloomingdale LLC — that operate as DentalWorks-branded offices under Sonrava Health, a national DSO platform (~600 locations, 21 states). The AO signal here reflects a Sonrava corporate manager role, not personal dentist ownership. Both locations were enumerated in late 2024 under identical LLC naming patterns and share a South Carolina phone number (803) 830-6881, consistent with Sonrava's centralized credentialing/NPI-registration operations. The Bloomingdale location is flagged as potentially moved/closed per Yelp as of May 2026.
owner_operator_identity: Sonrava Health (corporate parent); Sunil Eamani is listed as MANAGER of both LLCs — a Sonrava corporate/admin officer, not the beneficial owner or practicing dentist.

mso_platform_pe_evidence: Sonrava Health is the parent platform operating DentalWorks (~600 offices, 21 states). Formerly backed by New Mountain Capital (PE); Sonrava rebranded from Western Dental parent entity. See https://www.sonrava.com/aboutsonrava and https://www.sonrava.com/brands. DentalWorks is one of Sonrava's core consumer brands alongside Western Dental & Orthodontics, Brident Dental, Perfect Teeth. The Vernon Hills address (555 E Townline Rd #4) and Bloomingdale address (366 W Army Trail Rd 310A) appear on DentalWorks locator and directory listings confirming the brand affiliation.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Sunil Eamani is NOT a dentist-owner — he is a Sonrava corporate MANAGER used to enumerate new-location LLCs in NPPES. The AO cluster is a Sonrava admin artifact, not a dentist multi-office private group. Bloomingdale location (3d0e7f3e036f5842) flagged as potentially moved/closed per Yelp May 2026 — validate address currency before any outreach.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Sunil Eamani listed as MANAGER on two Illinois organization-type NPIs (1366268716 Vernon Hills 60061, 1093539363 Bloomingdale 60108) enumerated 2024-11/12. Both LLCs have parent_company=SONRAVA HEALTH in Data-Axle enrichment. Both have website=Dentalworks.com. Yelp and BBB directory listings confirm DentalWorks brand at 555 E Townline Rd Vernon Hills and 366 W Army Trail Rd Bloomingdale. Groupon listing names DCP of Illinois as the operating entity behind DentalWorks Vernon Hills. Sonrava.com confirms DentalWorks as a Sonrava brand operating ~600 offices nationally. No individual dentist-owner or independent group found — Eamani is a Sonrava admin/manager. Classification: branded_dso, pe_backed=true (Sonrava / formerly New Mountain Capital). Both locations already correctly classified dso_national in practice_locations.
future_app_notes: 1. Verify Bloomingdale address currency — Yelp flags it MOVED; if vacated, mark stale_closed. 2. Confirm DentalWorks Vernon Hills still operating at 555 E Townline Rd Suite 4. 3. Sonrava/DentalWorks friendly-PC pattern ('Dentist in [City] LLC') may yield additional IL offices on future NPPES enumerations — watch for new LLCs with same AO. 4. DCP of Illinois entity family (Vernon Hills Ltd, Bloomingdale Ltd) may have additional EIN/registered-agent filings through IL Secretary of State worth pulling. 5. pe_backed confirmed Sonrava (formerly New Mountain Capital) — update if Sonrava changes PE sponsor.
